chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-7622 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection Nos.6 and 21 2. For order on CMA No.32368/2022 3. For hearing of main case 28.8.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2022, which is almost three years ago. On 15.12.2022 and 26.12.2022, which is almost three years ago, none was present for the petitioner without intimation. In the last three years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to seriously pursue this petition. Today, once again, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has no interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
